title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 474.544 - Electronic will valid as a will for all purposes
text:
474.544.  Electronic will valid as a will for all purposes. — An electronic will shall be a will for all purposes of the laws of this state.  The provisions of law applicable to wills and principles of equity shall apply to an electronic will, except as modified by sections 474.540 to 474.564.
(L. 2025 H.B. 754)
